# API Access Control

Manage OCI API Access Control privileged API controls from Kubernetes with a reviewed controller-backed runtime.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Package | `apiaccesscontrol` |
| Support Status | Preview |
| Latest Released Version | `Not yet released` |
| Install Namespace | `oci-service-operator-apiaccesscontrol-system` |
| Controller Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-apiaccesscontrol:<version>` |
| Bundle Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-apiaccesscontrol-bundle:<version>` |
| Setup Guide | [Open guide](../../../installation.md) |

## Notes

- Current package scope is intentionally limited to PrivilegedApiControl while ApiMetadata, ApiMetadataByEntityType, PrivilegedApiRequest, and work-request helper families stay unpublished.
- The published runtime uses service-SDK work requests for create, update, and delete, with explicit pre-create reuse on exact `compartmentId`, `displayName`, and `resourceType`.
- No checked-in release manifest currently lists this package; the resource scope below reflects the current repository package metadata.
- This package is currently hidden from the Supported Resources landing page until a checked-in release manifest promotes it to the customer-visible surface.
